blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 54°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
